message:
style(widgets/drift_visualization): rustfmt reflow of buffer.get assertion

Pure rustfmt wrap of a single assertion that was over-long after
the earlier NoStyling cleanup landed new test helpers with
wider argument lists.

crates/ftui-widgets/src/drift_visualization.rs

- assert_eq!(frame.buffer.get(14, 2).unwrap().content.as_char(), Some(' '));
  is now split across three lines per rustfmt's default rule
  for long macro arguments:
    assert_eq!(
        frame.buffer.get(14, 2).unwrap().content.as_char(),
        Some(' ')
    );
- No functional change; `cargo fmt --check` now passes clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
